titleStmt.title: SII 9.496: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 496. (A.R. No. 385 of 1904.) ON TWO FACES OF A PILLAR SET UP IN THE RAMALINGESVARA TEMPLE AT RAMESVARAM, NEAR PRODDATURU, PRODDATURU TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1436, Bhāva, Chaitra, śu. 1, Sō[mavāra] corresponding to A.D. 1514 March 27 Monday. It records that king Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya made a gift of the village Payiṇḍāle in Chernūra-sīme for the service of the god Rāmayadēva at Mahā-Rāmēśvara in Ghaṇḍikōṭeya-sīme.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayā
bhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaru
ṣa 1436 saṁda mēle naḍeva bhāvasa
ṁvatsarada cayitra śu 1 sō lū
śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rā
japaramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī
kruṣṇarāyamahārāyaru
ghaṁḍikōṭeya sīmeyalū
mahārāmēśvarada rāmaidē
varige koṭa grāmada dharmaśā
sana rāmayadēvara pūje puna
skāra Amrutapaḍi naivēdyake cernu
ra sīmeyoḷagaṇa payiṁḍāle grā
mavanū tathātithima(ṁ)nvādi pu
ṇyakāladalū sahira(ṁ)ṇyōda
kadānadhārāpūrvakavāgi samarpisi
daru Ā payiṇḍāle Eṁba grāma
da catussīmege voḷagāda gadde be
dalu tōṁṭa tuḍike nidhi nikṣē
pa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣīṇa Āgāmi si
ddha sādhyagaḷeṁba Aṣṭabhōga tējassvā
mya Ēnu Uṁṭādanu Āgumāḍiko
ṁḍu rāmēśvara rāmayadēvara
pūja punaskāra Amṛtapaḍi nayi
vēdyavanū ceṁnāgi naḍasaluḷḷava
rū Eṁdu koṭṭa dharmaśāsana .
dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dā
nātśrēyōnṛpālanaṁ . dānātsva
rgamavāpnōti pālanādacyu
taṁ padaṁ . svadattāddviguṇa
ṁ pu(n)ṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ
paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ
niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . śrīvirūpākṣa .
Digital edition of SII 9.496 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
